Introduction: Oh, that's right... I heard someone new was moving onto that old farm.#$e#Just don't get in my way!$9
AcceptBirthdayGift_Positive: Hey, you remembered my birthday... Thanks, @! This is really nice!$h
AcceptBirthdayGift_Negative: Hey, you remembered my birthday... Thanks, @!$h#$b#Oh, it's, uh... *sniff*... what is it?$s
AcceptGift_(O)BatteryPack: Don't go thinking I owe you one just because I need this for my Chidori.
AcceptGift_(O)ShadowClone: This reminds me of a certain bothersome ninja. Keep it to yourself.
AcceptGift_(O)Chidori: If you think I need your help you're dead wrong. I can avenge my clan on my own.
AcceptGift_(O)FireQuartz: This fire quartz shines red like the sharingan of my clan. This gives me the strength to continue my fight. Thank you.
GreenRain: I've never seen a jutsu that turns rain green like this before. But nothing can evade my sharingan eyes!
GreenRain_2: Have you seen all the crazy trees around town? Everything looks so different... I feel like someone is using genjutsu.
cc_Begin: Don't tell anyone, but I snuck into the center to train and I think someone was using genjutsu. I saw something really weird...
AcceptGift_(O)279: Oh, wow... @! Do you even know what this is?#$b#My clan used to have a lot of these...$h
mineArea_10_oneday: I heard you've been exploring the old mines.$h#$e#I go there to train sometimes.$s
eventSeen_733330_memory_oneday: I went here to get stronger but I think you people are just holding me back more..#$e#I think I might just have to leave again.$h
eventSeen_1_memory_oneweek: This reminds me of the time a certain somebody kissed me...$hDon't go telling anyone about that.
eventSeen_2_memory_oneday: Some loser mentioned seeing something strange in the village.#$e#I didn't tell him it was me training! It might be better to keep that a secret, I don't need anyone trying to get in my way.$h
eventSeen_3: It's not the future I dream of anymore, it's only the past...$l
wonEggHunt: Feeling pretty good about the egg hunt, huh? You're lucky I took it easy on you...$u
wonEggHunt_memory_oneyear: I'm not mad about what happened last year, don't go thinking I worry about such things...
dating_Abigail: %Abigail is blushing, but she looks happy.
dating_Abigail_memory_oneyear: Uh... @? We've been dating for almost a year. Is this going anywhere?$s
dating_Sebastian_memory_oneday: I heard you and Sebastian started dating... I heard he doesn't actually like you...$6
dating_Sam: Hey, I heard you and Sam got together... He's kind of ugly!$h#$e#He reminds me of someone else I know, he was loud!
married_Sebastian: Finally got married huh? Looks like he won't be following his dreams after all.$6#$b#
married_Sam: Haha... I can't believe Sam is a married man. Who would've thought that someone like that could even be liked.$h#$e#
movieTheater: Did you hear about this weird new genjutsu? It like projects images and can be shown to multiple people at the same time.$h
Resort_Entering: I hope a strong enemy shows up, I want to test just how strong I've become.
Resort_Leaving: I'm gonna ask Willy if he wants to be my test dummy.
Resort_Leaving_2: Maybe we'll see a sea monster on the way back, I need some way to get stronger.
Resort_Shore: The beach is okay, but it makes it hard to train. I'd rather check out that dark jungle, or the volcano! They might have stronger foes!
Resort_Shore_2: Hmm, you think I could sneak off this island?#$e#Nah, Naruto will probably follow me after I leave.$h
Resort_Umbrella: My skin gets burnt really easily. So I'm just gonna train in the shadows.#$e#
Resort_Umbrella_2: Hey @, want to train with me?#$e#Theres this new jutsu I want to try.$h
Resort_Umbrella_3: Hey @, you think you could build a raft?#$e#I might try to get away from Naruto now that he is distracted... Wait nevermind he's looking over here.
Resort_Wander: An island this big has got to be hiding some kind of secret jutsu.#$e#It could even have one of the tailed beasts on it!
Resort_Bar: That Gus guy really makes me want to leave here already.$h
Mon: Oh, you spying on me? What are you from the Hidden Leaf?
Mon2: #$e#Do you ever hang out at the cemetery? Well don't I go there to train and I don't want to be bothered!
Tue: Ugh... I'm trying to train, go away!$s#$e# $a
Tue2: ...*sigh*...$s#$e#My parents were good to us. Why would my brother do this?
Wed: I didn't get much sleep last night. I was training.#$e#What do you want?
Fri: I had to sever my previous bonds. $u#$e#Don't think I won't do it again.
Fri2: those people are going to hang out in the saloon later. Maybe you should leave me alone and go join them.
Sat: The fresh mountain air is nice to train in.$h#$e#
Sun: Oh man... I've been training too hard.$s
Sun2: I wonder what drove my brother to do such things#$q 17/18/nothing Sun_old#...#$r 17 0 Sun_17#I have no idea.#$r 18 40 Sun_18#Maybe he had a good reason.#$r 17 0 Sun_17#To get stronger like you?#$r 18 0 Sun_17#Maybe they hurt him?#$r 17 30 Sun_nothing#...
Sun_old: $p 17#Me either...$u|Maybe I'll find out one day.
Sun_18: How or why would he do that?$h
Wed2: Oh, are you taking a break? I don't take breaks.#$e#
Tue4: ugh, it's you? Why are you here?$h#$e#
Sat6: You came all this way to visit me? That's stupid it also sounds like someone else I know.$h#$e#Maybe just leave me alone.$l
Thu10: Do you feel like everything seems unreal lately?$l#$b#Maybe we're under some kind of genjutsu...$h
Fri6: One day I will avenge my clan and when I do you'll all see.
Event_Grave1: These graves remind me of my clans, I hate my brother, all I feel is hate.$8
Event_Grave2: Ill kill him I swear! I'll avenge my clan!$8
Event_Grave3: I don't care if you don't take me seriously! He will pay!$8
Event_Grave4: These graves only fuel my hate for my brother more! All they do is remind me of what remains of my clan, me.$8
Event_Rain_1: This rain can't stop me from reaching my goal.$8
Event_Rain_2: This rain only reminds me of that day...
Event_Rain_3: ...*sigh*...I'll take his life on my own.$8
Event_Tragic_1: I'm not living for me...I'm living to avenge my clan...$s
Event_Tragic_3: I feel like I'm almost strong enough...$s
Event_Cave2_1: @ Didn't I tell you not to get in the way of my training!$8
Event_Cave_1: You aren't strong enough to be here!$8
Event_Cave_2: I have nothing else to lose!$l
summer_Mon: All my training is paying off.
summer_Tue: The wind only fuels my rage!$u
summer_Wed: After all this time you're still here?
summer_6: I went to the beach at night to train and I see something weird starring back at me.
summer_Thu4: I feel as if the heat is helping me train.$s
summer_Fri: I kind of wish I had a summon. Like summoning jutsu. I would summon a crow, or a snake.
summer_Sat: Fall reminds me of my clans ceremonies.
summer_Wed2: That farm house is kind of similar to the houses my clan had...
summer_Tue4: You're an cool I guess ${guy^lady}$, @. I wish you didn't get in my way as much though...$h
summer_Sat6: I think my training is finally paying off.
summer_Mon8: I used to think this town had nothing to offer, but that mine does help with my training.$h
summer_Thu10: Wow, that's a cool sword you have, but do you even know how to use it?$l
summer_Fri10: Do you ever feel like you are alone?
fall_Mon: I need to hurry to the mines to train.
fall_Tue: You call it revenge I call it justice...$h
fall_Wed: I can't wait to see the look on everyone's face when I finally get justice for my clan.
fall_Sat: $d cc#I can't believe you fixed up that old Community Center all by yourself. I'm really impressed.|Do you have any scarecrows on your farm?
fall_Sun: Hmm... what should I do tonight?#$q 27/28 fall_Sun_old#I was thinking about dyeing my hair again... what do you think?#$r 27 10 Sun_27#Dye it black.#$r 27 10 Sun_27#Why not blonde?#$r 27 20 Sun_WildColor#How about bubblegum pink?#$r 28 0 Sun_28#I like your hair just the way it is!
fall_Sun_old: $p 27#I was going to dye my hair but then I decided against it.|Yes? What is it?
Sun_27: I guess that's a pretty safe choice, huh?#$e#I'll think about it.
Sun_28: Of course that's what you'd say.$u
Sun_WildColor: You're always good for a laugh.$h
fall_Wed2: Are you growing pumpkins on your farm this year?#$e#Save one for me!$h
fall_Tue4: I may fight with my parents a lot, but I know they're just looking out for me. They're doing what they think is best.$s#$b#I dunno why I'm saying this to you. Don't tell anyone.$8
fall_Sat6: Hi.$h#$e#Your hair looks cool today... did you do something different?
fall_Mon8: You know, I could actually see myself becoming a farmer some day...#$e#But how would that ever happen? *chuckle*$l
fall_Thu10: I had an interesting dream last night, with you in it.#$e#It was a good dream.$h
fall_Fri6: I wish the season lasted a little longer.$8#$e#When the wind really picks up, I almost feel like a kid again.
fall_Fri10: I usually feel lonely this time of year, but not anymore.$l#$e#@, what are your plans for the future?
winter_1: Well, fall is over...$s#$e#But I like winter, too!$h
winter_Mon: It's just too cold to go outside much.#$e#But I do enjoy building a snowgoon.$h
winter_Tue: Doesn't a steaming hot cup of cocoa sound good right now?
winter_Wed: Hi. Is it boring to be a farmer during the winter?
spring_12: I'm definitely going to enter the egg hunt tomorrow. Are you?
spring_23: Well, tomorrow is the flower dance. Dancing is alright, but they make me wear this stupid white dress...$s
winter_7: I'm looking forward to making a snow man tomorrow.
fall_26: Will I see you tomorrow at the Spirit's Eve festival? Look for me in the haunted maze.$h
summer_10: Everyone's excited for the Luau tomorrow. Maybe a little nervous, too, considering the Governor will be here.
summer_27: You can't miss tomorrow's festival. It's one of the most beautiful wonders of the valley.
winter_24: I'm going to eat so much cranberry sauce tomorrow.$h
winter_Thu: Another year is almost over.#$e#It goes by so fast, doesn't it?$s
winter_Fri: One thing I've learned living here... everyone stares at you if you look different.
winter_Sat: It's the weekend!#$e#That means I can play twice as many video games.$h#$e#Bye.
winter_Sun: Oh, hello.#$q 29/30 winter_Sun_old#I made these two drawings. What do you think?#$r 29 20 Sun_29#I like the jungle island and the tiger.#$r 30 5 Sun_30#I like the orc with the battleaxe.#$r 29 -50 Sun_Bad#I don't like either of them.
winter_Sun_old: $p 29#Remember those drawings I showed you a while ago? I accidentally threw them away.$s|Remember that drawing I showed you with the orc? I entered it into an online contest and won 50g!$h
Sun_29: Oh yeah? I guess that makes sense.
Sun_30: I'm glad. It's embarrassing to share your art with others. But I think you and I are on the same page.
Sun_Bad: Rude! Why would you hurt my feelings like that? You're so insensitive!$s
winter_Wed2: Hi. If you're ever bored, you can always hang out in my room.#$e#As long as I'm not changing, of course!
winter_Tue4: It's so cold, I wish we had a hot cup of cocoa to share.$h
winter_Sat6: I've been daydreaming a lot lately...#$e#Oh! You want to know what it's about? Well...$u#$b#...It's a secret.$h
winter_Thu10: Another year is almost over...#$b#But this was a really good year, don't you think?$h
winter_Wed6: It must be nice not having crops to worry about this time of year.#$e#And that means you can hang out with me more often!$h
winter_Fri10: @, there's something I want to tell you...#$e#It's just... um... well... your boots! They, uh...look really clean... *gulp*#$e#That's all... *sigh*$s
Wed4: I can't trust a person who doesn't like animals...#$e#Oh, don't worry! I know you're an animal lover!$h
